Thanks for contributing to Expendit! Please fill out the sections below.
Keep the title in Conventional Commits style, e.g. "feat(web): add expense filters".
-->

## Description

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related Issues

<!-- Link issues, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / tooling / refactor

## Affected Area

- [ ] `api/common` (Go backend)
- [ ] `web` (Next.js)
- [ ] `mobile` (Flutter)
- [ ] `deploy` / infrastructure
- [ ] `docs`

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my changes
- [ ] I have added tests where applicable and they pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] Linting passes locally (`make lint`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation where needed
- [ ] I have not committed secrets, credentials, or `.env` files
